title: 2022年9月大学英语六级真题(第1套)

sections.title: Part I Writing
sections.directions: For this p a rt, you are allowed 30 minutes to write an essay that begins with the sentence "It is now widely accepted that mutual trust and openness is the key to promoting cooperation." You can make comments,cite examples or use your personal experiences to develop your essay. You should write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words
sections.prompt: It is now widely accepted that mutual trust and openness is the key to promoting cooperation.

options.A: It enables people to earn more money.
options.B: It teaches the importance of financing
options.D: It introduces a novel way to invest.

options.A: Many Americans are not satisfied with their income.
options.B: Many Americans have no idea about how to invest.
options.C: Most Americans do not know how to save money.
options.D: Most Americans do not stick to a budget.

options.A: It offers a greater variety of items.
options.C: It changes one's way of living.
options.D: It saves one's time for shopping.
It has been vacant for months.

options.B: Pay the first month's rent and a deposit.
options.C: Check the references of the flat owner.
options.D: Consult his solicitor one more time.

options.A: She can have a wonderful view of the pond.
options.B: She will be much closer to her work place.
options.C: She can make friends with new neighbours.
options.D: She will have plenty of space for her shoes.

options.A: The more commercials they see, the more brands they get to know
options.B: The more commercials they see, the more they adore celebrities
options.C: The more television they watch, the fewer conflicts in the family
options.D: The more television they watch, the greater their parents' stress

options.B: Not getting the reward they deserve

sections.title: Part IV Translation
sections.directions:
For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to translate a passage from Chinese into 
English. You should write your answer on Answer Sheet 2.
sections.source: 中央电视台总部大楼位于北京市朝阳区，总建筑面积约55万平方术。主楼由两座塔楼组成，因其独特的造型，成为这座城市的一个热门景点，每天都吸引众多特客前来参观。大楼的创新结构是中外建筑师长期合作的成果，不仅体现了环保意识，而且大大节约了建筑材料。中央电视台总部设有一条穿过大楼的专用通道，向公众展示各个工作室以及中央电视台的历史。在那里，参观者还可以看到故宫和北京其他地方的壮观景色。2022年6月英语六级真题第3套第1页共1页英语菌的笔记
